task.title: Infrastructure Setup (Bolt - Kubernetes)
task.description: Set up foundational infrastructure including databases, message queues, and core services needed for the system
task.details: Deploy PostgreSQL database cluster, Set up Redis for caching and sessions, Configure message queue (RabbitMQ/Kafka), Set up monitoring and logging infrastructure, Configure load balancers and ingress, Set up CI/CD pipelines, Configure secrets management

decision.options: Read replicas, Horizontal sharding, Connection pooling
